home.description: Here you will find some of my projects.

drivent.desc: A whitelabel app developed for event management.

mywallet.desc: An app developed to manage daily entries for financial control.

cineflex.desc: An app developed to manage ticket bookings in movie theaters.

trackit.desc: An app for registering habits and tracking them.

zaprecall.desc: A Flashcards app. Flashcards are cards that contain a question/statement on the front and an answer on the back. You can use them to train your memory with Active Recall and Spaced Repetition methodologies.

forca.title: Hangman Game
forca.desc: The player must guess a word by picking letter by letter, and if they make 6 mistakes, they lose the game. If they guess the word before that, they win.

instagram.title: Instagram Clone
instagram.desc: Small clone of the Instagram layout to test ReactJS componentization. This project was just a proof of concept to understand how the ReactJS world works.
